rationale: Educ. Code §49.0122 governs transitional election dates for school district homestead exemption elections for elderly/disabled persons during 2025-2026. It does not address the base exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: This section applies only to an election under this chapter that occurs during the 2025-2026 school year.
_note: No direct conflict; rule concerns election timing, not exemption amounts.
